texto: Those of us who believe in princesses are often laughed at. But I believe the world needs princesses and dukes and queens and kings. We need people who glitter and shine and make a room silent with their entrance. We need them the same way we need ice cream and soccer and music and stories. Oh, how we need stories.
explicacao: Citação de Beverly Bartlett sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Those of us who believe in princesses are often laughed at. But I believe the world needs princes…” articula reflexao, fiction, believe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
